programmes.show_description: Step out in style in Skechers! Renowned for their on-trend, sporty designs, you can now find their fab shoes at QVC too!
Easy care, easy wear, easy elegance in this mix and match collection of unique and versatile pieces created for the smart, elegant, busy women seeking comfort that doesn't compromise style.
Showcasing the fashionable and classic bags created by this international brand, including handbags, rucksacks, travel bags and weekend away bags.
Step out in style in Skechers! Renowned for their on-trend, sporty designs, you can now find their fab shoes at QVC too!
Join designer Kim Mendelson as she presents her latest lines. Daytime chic to evening sophistication, weekend comfort to party glamour, the Kim & Co collection is designed for every aspect of life.

Elegant, bohemian-style fashion awaits in this show dedicated to the iconic brand Monsoon, who offer you a range of vibrant prints and flattering shapes to give you clothes you'll adore.

Discover Orfeo Paris, new to QVC. Explore elegant fashion pieces designed to bring Parisian flair and effortless style to your wardrobe.
Explore Weird Fish, new to QVC. Discover casual, comfortable clothing with unique designs, perfect for relaxed days and effortless style.
Discover Raffya, new to QVC. Explore stylish, handcrafted accessories designed to add a touch of elegance and individuality to your look.
Discover playful style with Compañia Fantastica, new to QVC. Explore unique prints and vibrant fashion pieces to refresh your wardrobe with a touch of fun.
Ben de Lisi is bringing his gorgeous fashion aesthetic to QVC UK. With a focus on beautiful fabrics and innovative design, Ben's distinctive look is the epitome of modern elegance.
Elevate your style with Ruth Langsford's chic fashion collection. From classic jeans to vibrant prints, find the perfect pieces to boost your fashion confidence.
Step into Style with Sam
Plant Your Garden with Michael.

Refresh your wardrobe with Denim & Co's spring fashion. Discover stylish, easy-to-wear pieces perfect for the season's fresh start.
Master the art of layering with expert tips and stylish essentials. Discover how to create versatile looks for every season and elevate your wardrobe with ease.
Kick start your January with a fabulous wardrobe update! You're cordially invited to join us for an exclusive look at our all of our new fashion offers here at QVC.

Relax in style and comfort with our great range of everyday shoes, including comfy flats, supportive trainers and chic sandals. Tune in now for an hour of casual footwear perfect for your new routine.
